_note: One config per group (ARCHITECTURE §5). Slug `group_id` is load-bearing — it is the output path site/data/<group_id>/ and the URL. `display_name` is cosmetic.
_count_conference_championship_note: Per-group rule (ARCHITECTURE §1/§5): do conference-championship wins settle into a team's season win total? Sportsbooks differ, so it is per-group config, not a code constant. CFBD returns conf-title games as seasonType=regular; the shared cache tags them but excludes nothing — this flag decides. Default false.
_pick_rules_note: Draft rules, enforced by validate_team_names.py. null = unenforced (Zach sets the real numbers per group; the engine skips the check when null — never assume a value).
_managers_note: Locked real identities; remaining managers added at draft. `manager_id` is the stable join key everywhere — never displayed. `display_name` is cosmetic. `email` per manager (recipient list derives from these when email_enabled).
